if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
ci.comp_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
ci.comp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
ci.rpst_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
ci.chrg_prsn LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.sql: ci.comp_id, ci.comp_nm, ci.comp_rmk, ci.rgst_no, ci.corp_no, ci.rpst_nm, ci.zip_cd, ci.addrs1, ci.addrs2, ci.chrg_prsn, ci.tel_no, ci.biz_nm, ci.biz_cd, ci.main_prdt, ci.prd_amt, ci.photo_file_id, ci.cmplt_de, ci.fl_area, ci.sales_amt, ci.full_empl_cnt, ci.avrg_work_hr, ci.up_comp_id, ci.del_yn, ci.attach_id, ci.invite_key,
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_orgn_status ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, write_dt, comp_id, orgn_id, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'ORGST', (select COALESCE(LPAD(TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(doc_no)::INTEGER + 1, '99999')), 5, '0'), '00001') from esg.tb_orgn_status WHERE write_year = TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYY') AND doc_type = 'ORGST'), #{writeDt}, #{compId}, #{orgnId}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy} ) RETURNING doc_no

INSERT INTO esg.tb_orgn_status_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, comp_id, gubun, work_desc, issue, risk, chance, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, (SELECT COALESCE(LPAD(TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(doc_seq)::INTEGER + 1, '99999')), 5, '0'), '00001') FROM esg.tb_orgn_status_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} ), #{compId}, #{gubun}, #{workDesc}, #{issue}, #{risk}, #{chance}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO esg.tb_approval_info ( target_type, target_id, hr_id, signature, param, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( 'ORGST', #{targetId}, #{hrId}, #{signature}, #{param}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select:
WITH rec_all AS (SELECT TRIM(TO_CHAR(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at)), '9999')) years, r.write_year, r.doc_type, r.doc_no, r.write_dt, r.orgn_id, r.use_yn, (SELECT orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info z WHERE z.orgn_id = r.orgn_id) orgn_nm, TO_CHAR(COALESCE(r.updated_at, r.created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') created_at, (SELECT hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info WHERE user_id = r.created_by) created_by, '' approval_key FROM esg.tb_orgn_status r WHERE comp_id = #{compId} ) SELECT a.years, a.write_year, a.doc_type, a.doc_no, a.write_dt, a.orgn_id, a.orgn_nm, a.use_yn, (select COUNT(doc_seq) from esg.tb_orgn_status_detail c where a.write_year = c.write_year and a.doc_type = c.doc_type and a.doc_no = c.doc_no) as cnt, a.created_at, a.created_by, a.approval_key, esg.fn_getapprovalstatus(a.doc_type,a.write_year||a.doc_no) as approval_status, tai.hr_nm as writer FROM rec_all a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai on tai.target_type = a.doc_type and tai.target_id = a.write_year || a.doc_no and param = 'writer' WHERE 1=1 AND ( (a.created_at LIKE '%' || '' || '%') OR (a.orgn_nm LIKE '%' || '' || '%') )
order by write_year desc, use_yn desc, doc_no desc

SELECT tosd.write_year, tosd.doc_type, tosd.doc_no, tosd.doc_seq, tosd.comp_id, tosd.gubun, tosd.work_desc, tosd.issue, tosd.risk, tosd.chance, tosd.use_yn, tosd.created_at, tosd.created_by, tosd.updated_at, tosd.updated_by, tos.write_dt, tos.orgn_id, tos.use_yn as useYnM, toi.orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_status_detail tosd INNER JOIN esg.tb_orgn_status tos ON tos.write_year = tosd.write_year AND tos.doc_type = tosd.doc_type AND tos.doc_no = tosd.doc_no INNER JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.orgn_id = tos.orgn_id WHERE tosd.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tosd.doc_type = #{docType} AND tosd.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY tosd.use_yn desc, tosd.write_year, tosd.doc_seq

SELECT tos.write_year, tos.doc_type, tos.doc_no, tos.write_dt, toi.comp_id, toi.orgn_nm, tos.created_at, tos.created_by, tos.updated_at, tos.updated_by FROM esg.tb_orgn_status tos join esg.tb_orgn_info toi on toi.comp_id = tos.comp_id and toi.orgn_id = tos.orgn_id WHERE tos.comp_id = #{compId} and tos.write_year = #{writeYear} and tos.doc_type = #{docType} and tos.doc_no = #{docNo}

SELECT
created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, 'U' cmd
FROM tb_comp_info ci
WHERE invite_key = #{inviteKey}
